推荐场景: 朋友聚会桌边｜综合过去时间线和小问题
60秒任务: 「过去故事 Boss」：过去事件时间线；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 过去时｜事件顺序｜人物地点动作｜结果｜简单原因
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Yesterday, I went to ___.（故事开头）
First, I took the bus.（顺序一）
Then I met a friend at ___.（顺序二）
We bought coffee and talked.（活动）
The place was crowded, so we left early.（原因+结果）
I lost my ticket, but I found it later.（问题+解决）
A staff member helped me.（帮助）
I missed the first train.（交通问题）
I got home late.（结果）
What happened next?（追问）
It was a small problem.（评价）
I was tired but happy.（感受）
I didn’t buy much.（否定）
I called my family in the evening.（后续）
That was my day.（收尾）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: yesterday, bus, friend, coffee, ticket, train, staff, family, evening, problem
Verbs: went, took, met, bought, talked, left, lost, found, missed, called
Adjectives: crowded, late, tired, happy, small
Time / Place: first, then, later, in the evening, at home
Chunks: happened next, left early, got home late, tired but happy, my day
